mean?But say someone hosts a shift at 9:00pm for Americas, can someone host a shift at 10:30pm for Oceania?And are you able to program it to give a relative cooldown amount?No, how the cooldown works is it checks when the last message was sent in the <#1253307750000230480> channel.
If it was sent earlier than 2 hours ago, it doesn't let you host a session.
If it was sent after 2 hours ago, it lets you host the session.So it doesn't take timezones into account. It just checks the last message in the sessions channelWe're on break! You can host again [relative cooldown]GUILD_COOLDOWN: 'I heard you the first time! You can re-use this command again in %cooldown%s.'this## Server Rules
Rule 1: Respect.
Be respectful to everyone and to the server. Use appropriate language in the appropriate channel.

Rule 2: Control the next shift.
Do not ask when the next shift is. Use the /shift command to find out.

Rule 3: Show up.
React to shift pings honestly. If you say you can join, join in a timely manner.

Rule 4: Don't be annoying.
No trolling, spamming, instigating, or spreading hate.`

Rule 5: Do not DM Mods.
Ask questions in ⁠﹒questions-suggestions or use Appy in ⁠﹒support.

Rule 6: No advertising other servers.
Create a ticket for partnerships in ⁠﹒support.
* Rule 6a: Bloxburg RP businesses that have open job positions can be posted in ⁠﹒self-employed as per its guidelines.

Rule 7: Follow the Discord ToS.

Consequences
Rules 1-3: 3 warnings, 4th offense results in one-day mute. 5th offense results in perm mute. You can still see, but you can't speak or react anymore.
Rules 4-6: 2 warnings, 3rd offense is one-day mute. 4th offense is server ban.
Rule 7: Immediate ban.## Shift Agreements
Agreement A.i: Only use official Neighborhoods.
We have many to choose from listed in ⁠﹒server-info.
* Agreement A.ii: If you are not cooperating with your coworkers, you might be kicked from the neighborhood.

Agreement B: Whoever pinged for the shift is the Shift Lead.
The Shift Lead encourages fun & friendliness, settles differences, manages mood breaks, starts a family in case people go AFK in their position and slow down efficiency.

Agreement C: Listen to your Shift Lead and join their Family.
They can ping the server owner and have you kicked for insubordinance.

Agreement D: If you need to go AFK, leave your position.
Especially at Blox Burger. Sit in the lobby, step away from a register or dance on the dishwasher to keep the workplace clear.

Agreement E: You're responsible for your friend's behavior.
Friends are welcome to join even if they're not in this server, but make them aware of the Agreements. You will be held accountable for their actions.

Agreement F: Work together, or apart.
If your work ethic (or internet connection) is slowing down the team, they can vote in whisper to your shift lead to send you to cashier. Please comply when asked or see Agreement C.

Repercussions
3 reminders, 4th reminder of any rule will result in a ban from the neighborhoods. You will need to open a ticket to have it removed.# Introducing the BEE Manager 🐝 !
Been in the server a minute, and still a bit confused about how to start your own shift? No worries! We've got a bot for that!

Whenever you want to work with some people, use the new command /shift!
It will ask for a few details, and then ! BEE Manager 🐝 will announce to the appropriate region that you'd like to lead a shift! If it's not the right time, the bot knows that, too, so you won't break an over-pinging rule. When it's time to start, only whoever reacted will be pinged, so we don't have to let the whole region know a second time that we're about to get richer than them.

## Wait a minute.... This seems too easy. Is there a catch?
No! Well... maybe. There are different cooldowns and permissions in place now.
- The entire server still has a 2-hour cooldown
- Shift Managers still have the 2-hour cooldown
- Server Boosters have a 3-hour cooldown
- Workers have a 6-hour cooldown

so that the bots posts shifts there and workers can react to itwait anyone who joins gets the worker role? or only level 3+?wait anyone who joins gets the worker role? or only level 3+?Anyone. It's the "everyone"yeah its like the member roleI was going to make it the Verified role but there were already so many ppl with the roleokay so let me just check with you rqwho CAN host shifts?who CAN host shifts?Arcane level 2 (not 3,I changed it) Trainees.okay so let me just check with you rqAlso, would you check on the events tab and join one of the Trainings# Introducing the BEE Manager 🐝 !
Been in the server a minute, and still a bit confused about how to start your own shift? No worries! We've got a bot for that!

Whenever you want to work with some people, use the new command /shift!
It will ask for a few details, and then ! BEE Manager 🐝 will announce to the appropriate region that you'd like to lead a shift! If it's not the right time, the bot knows that, too, so you won't break an over-pinging rule. When it's time to start, only whoever reacted will be pinged, so we don't have to let the whole region know a second time that we're about to get richer than them.

## Wait a minute.... This seems too easy. Is there a catch?
No! Well... maybe. There are different cooldowns and permissions in place now.
- The entire server still has a 2-hour cooldown
- Shift Managers still have the 2-hour cooldown
- Server Boosters have a 3-hour cooldown
- Trainees+ have a 6-hour cooldown
- New Hires are not able to use the bot until they've leveled up to Trainee at Level 2. Level up by chatting with us and posting your paychecks from shifts in #proof
Details about levels can be found in #perksalright niceokay but one problem# Introducing the BEE Manager 🐝 ! Been in the server a minute, and still a bit confused about how to start your own shift? No worries! We've got a bot for that! The "Admin" role is never an actual role, its just the ability to have the "Administrator" permission onYou get shift manager permissions if you have the shift-manager role
But you get admin permissions if you have the administrator permission in any role[For more information](https://discordjs.guide/slash-commands/permissions.html#member-permissions)You get shift manager permissions if you have the shift-manager role But you get admin permissions if you have the administrator permission in any roleOhh okiMan I missed it it was at like 1 amIf you still want to test I should be free soonIf you still want to test I should be free soonOh it's OK I think I get itOk*OK sounds like I'm shouting lolOK sounds like I'm shouting lolYEAH I AGREEYEAH I AGREELolllOh it's OK I think I get itWell in context with other things, OK I think blends in as an acronym of okay and therefore not shoutingI hate swyping these days.Oh it's OK I think I get itWould you like to be a shift manager?
